Property.name: DrawStyle
Property.doc: The draw style of the objects contained within this layer

Property.name: LineColor
Property.doc: The line color of the objects contained within this layer

Property.name: LinePrintColor
Property.doc: The line color of the objects contained within this layer, when used on a TechDraw page

Property.name: LineWidth
Property.doc: The line width of the objects contained within this layer

Property.name: OverrideLineColorChildren
Property.doc: If it is true, the objects contained within this layer will adopt the line color of the layer

Property.name: OverrideShapeAppearanceChildren
Property.doc: If it is true, the objects contained within this layer will adopt the shape appearance of the layer

Property.name: ShapeAppearance
Property.doc: The shape appearance of the objects contained within this layer

Property.name: ShapeColor
Property.doc: The shape color of the objects contained within this layer

Property.name: Transparency
Property.doc: The transparency of the objects contained within this layer

Property.name: UsePrintColor
Property.doc: If it is true, the print color will be used when objects in this layer are placed on a TechDraw page

Property.name: DrawStyle
Property.doc: The draw style of the objects contained within this layer

Property.name: LineColor
Property.doc: The line color of the objects contained within this layer

Property.name: LinePrintColor
Property.doc: The line color of the objects contained within this layer, when used on a TechDraw page

Property.name: LineWidth
Property.doc: The line width of the objects contained within this layer

Property.name: OverrideLineColorChildren
Property.doc: If it is true, the objects contained within this layer will adopt the line color of the layer

Property.name: OverrideShapeAppearanceChildren
Property.doc: If it is true, the objects contained within this layer will adopt the shape appearance of the layer

Property.name: ShapeAppearance
Property.doc: The shape appearance of the objects contained within this layer

Property.name: ShapeColor
Property.doc: The shape color of the objects contained within this layer

Property.name: Transparency
Property.doc: The transparency of the objects contained within this layer

Property.name: UsePrintColor
Property.doc: If it is true, the print color will be used when objects in this layer are placed on a TechDraw page

Camera.settings:
OrthographicCamera { viewportMapping ADJUST_CAMERA position 131.24982 -63.443203 324.17334 orientation 0.98260915 -0.029043078 -0.18340054 0.36968738 nearDistance 290.4729 farDistance 377.18591 aspectRatio 1 focalDistance 250 height 168.65323
